title: 60th Birthday Blue Flag Bunting Age 60 Navy Blue Party Banner Decoration Garland Pennant Decor UP
features: Our Stunning Birthday Party Bunting is perfect for celebrating your birthday. A bold modern print design, stunning artwork and beautiful holographic flashes
Our holographic bunting is 2.7 meters long, containing 11 flags. Each pack contains one banner, no assembly required.

Use party bunting to brighten up spaces by draping it across walls, doorways, or tables. Hang it along fences, trees, or railings for outdoor events. Use it to frame dessert tables or photo backdrops.

Party flags are versatile decorations, ideal for adding color and energy to events. They can be strung across walls, ceilings, or entryways, used as table runners, or hung outdoors to create a festive atmosphere.
